findings.description: Parallel pipeline claim directly contradicted by Stage 2 sequential dependency. Confirmed finding.
findings.evidence: Overview: "All pipeline stages run in parallel to maximize throughput." Stage 2: "Stage 2 must complete before Stage 3 begins."

findings.description: Performance section describes streaming in present tense as current behavior; Conclusions frames real-time streaming as future work. The document cannot be both at once.
findings.evidence: "For larger payloads, streaming is preferred." vs "Future work includes adding a real-time streaming workflow alongside the existing batch pipeline."
findings.suggestion: Clarify: is streaming already supported or planned? Align both sections.

findings.description: The dead-letter queue is mentioned but no operational handling is described (how DLQ events are reviewed, retried, or purged).
findings.evidence: "malformed events are rejected with a 400 response and logged to the dead-letter queue." — no further DLQ operational description.
findings.suggestion: Add DLQ handling policy note (manual review, alert trigger, automatic purge).
